title: Implement Metaproject Security v0.1 (Phase 1+2: security command + deterministic engine)

AC1.note: security scan on an AWS key → finding secret/critical/block; raw key absent from latest.md/json; hash is HMAC-keyed (test asserts != plain sha256). Verified.

AC2.note: check-output --target memory on email+phone → pii/redact with fixed-width typed masks ([REDACTED:email]); no partial reveal. Test scenario 2.

AC3.note: check-input external: injection alone → warn; injection+egress → escalate to require-approval/block via precedence+confidence. Test scenario 3.

AC4.note: ci mode: report/scan exit 1 on blocker; advisory exits 0. Verified in temp dir + test scenario 4.

AC5.note: mode downgrade + configChecksum mismatch → warning + incident; checksum mismatch now fail-closed (critical/block) so ci exits 1. Verified + AC5 test.

AC6.note: findings validate vs security-finding.schema; reports vs security-report.schema; committable latest.* carry no hashes/raw values (toCommittableReport strips hash). Tests + grep verified.

AC7.note: security registered as 9th module (init --no-security); manifest entry; data/security/raw gitignored (git check-ignore hmac.key); update leaves data/ untouched; standard validate PASS.

AC8.note: 10 §13 behavioral tests + schema validity + nested-overlap redaction regression; bun test 118 pass / 0 fail; tsc clean.

AC9.note: docs updated: cli-reference/modules/architecture (security), roadmap (implemented Phase 1+2), README, security spec/README status; Phase 3/4 marked future; no drift.
